hooks.command: $json = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $path = $json.tool_input.file_path; $cmd = $json.tool_input.command; if ($path -match '\.step$' -or $cmd -match '\.step') { Write-Error 'Blocked: edit amphibious_hybrid_hexacopter_step.py instead and regenerate the STEP file'; exit 2 }
